reasoning: In late February 2025, Anthropic released Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Historically, model generations in the Claude family have been spaced out, with incremental updates like 3.5 and 3.7 signaling the continuation of the 'Claude 3' lineage rather than a quick leap to version 4. Given that we are at mid-May 2025 (the knowledge cutoff), there are only 1.5 months left before the July 1, 2025 resolution date. A major jump to Claude 4 within 4 months of releasing 3.7 is extremely unlikely, particularly since there are no official announcements, rumors, or leaks pointing to an imminent release of Claude 4. They may even need to round out the 3.7 series (e.g. 3.7 Opus or Haiku) first. Therefore, the chance of Claude 4 launching prior to July 1, 2025 is near zero.
